message:
Sanitize corrupted rate_limits.json state on load

Fixes ntm-45 part 2: when LoadFromDir deserializes persisted rate limit
state, reset any delays that are negative or exceed 1 hour (indicating
prior overflow corruption), and clear cooldown timestamps more than 1 hour
in the future. This prevents corrupted state from the fixed overflow bug
in calculateDelay from persisting across restarts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
